## How to verify

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] If touching `data/ahj/**`, `pnpm verify:ahj --slug <slug>` is green
- [ ] If touching a `severity: blocking` rule, two reviewers requested
